title: Plakar GitLab CE Importer Connector Config

location.description: GitLab source URI. Use gitlab://local for local operation, or set ssh_host for remote operation.

backup_path.description: Directory where gitlab-backup create writes backup archives. Defaults to /var/opt/gitlab/backups.

config_paths.description: Comma-separated GitLab config files to include. Defaults to /etc/gitlab/gitlab.rb,/etc/gitlab/gitlab-secrets.json.

config_dir.description: Base config directory used for restore. Defaults to /etc/gitlab.

gitlab_backup_bin.description: gitlab-backup binary name or absolute path. Defaults to gitlab-backup.

use_sudo.description: Prefix local and remote GitLab commands and privileged reads with sudo -n. Defaults to false.

ssh_host.description: Remote GitLab host. When set, commands run through ssh instead of locally.

ssh_identity_file.description: SSH private key path for remote operation.

ssh_bin.description: SSH binary name or absolute path. Defaults to ssh.
